text.title: Solo-Scale Affiliate Program Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Solo-Scale Affiliate Program.

example.scenario: Solo SaaS, $7K MRR, 30% margin, on Lemon Squeezy.
example.trace: platform = LemonSqueezy → commission 20% (≤30% margin) → cookie 60 days → fraud: self-ref + IP overlap + refund-clawback at 14 days → cap $1500/mo
